mma8452q_init.tooltip: Create and initialize SparkFun MMA8452Q 3-axis accelerometer

mma8452q_available.tooltip: Check if MMA8452Q has new acceleration data

mma8452q_read.tooltip: Read latest raw acceleration data from MMA8452Q

mma8452q_get_axis_raw.tooltip: Read MMA8452Q specified axis raw value (12-bit integer)

mma8452q_get_axis_g.tooltip: Read MMA8452Q specified axis acceleration (in g)

mma8452q_read_pl.tooltip: Read MMA8452Q orientation (0=Portrait Up, 1=Portrait Down, 2=Landscape Right, 3=Landscape Left)
